exercises.prompt: List the name of every Pokémon.
hints: You need exactly two clauses: SELECT (which column?) and FROM (which table?).
The column is called name and the table is called pokemon.

exercises.prompt: Show each Pokémon's name, primary type (type1), and total stat score.
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, type1, total FROM pokemon
hints: List multiple columns after SELECT, separated by commas.
The three columns are name, type1, and total.

```sql
SELECT name, type1, total FROM pokemon
```

exercises.prompt: Show each Pokémon's name and both of its type columns: type1 and type2.
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, type1, type2 FROM pokemon
hints: Same two clauses as before — SELECT the columns you want, FROM the pokemon table.
List all three columns after SELECT: name, type1, type2.

```sql
SELECT name, type1, type2 FROM pokemon
```

exercises.prompt: Show each Pokémon's name, height in meters (height_m), and weight in kilograms (weight_kg).
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, height_m, weight_kg FROM pokemon
hints: Pick the three columns the question names; the table is still pokemon.
The columns are name, height_m, and weight_kg.

```sql
SELECT name, height_m, weight_kg FROM pokemon
```

exercises.prompt: Show each Pokémon's name along with its six individual base stats: hp, attack, defense, special_attack, special_defense, and speed.
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, hp, attack, defense, special_attack, special_defense, speed FROM pokemon
hints: The six base stats are each their own column — list them all after name, comma-separated.
Select name, hp, attack, defense, special_attack, special_defense, and speed.

```sql
SELECT name, hp, attack, defense, special_attack, special_defense, speed FROM pokemon
```

exercises.prompt: Show each Pokémon's name, the generation it was introduced in, and the name of the Pokémon it evolves from (evolves_from).
exercises.referenceSql: SELECT name, generation, evolves_from FROM pokemon
hints: Choose the three requested columns; evolves_from is just another column name.
The columns are name, generation, and evolves_from.

```sql
SELECT name, generation, evolves_from FROM pokemon
```
